purpose_context: After the MissionTopology SSOT seam closed the coordination/primary planning-surface desync, several now-vestigial constructs remain: a three-valued type encoding a two-valued decision, a dead persistence shim, scattered legacy band-aids, and roughly 750-1000 lines of duplicated meta-reading and routing logic. This mission removes that debt behavior-neutrally, folds two accept-gate bugs that stall finished missions, and turns one band-aid removal into a correctness win that protects un-migrated missions from the stale-coordination data-loss path.
purpose_tldr: Remove now-dead type/shim debt and consolidate duplicated mission-shape logic into one authority, while extending a recent data-loss fix to un-migrated missions.
